At the first meeting of the COM
mission to draft new city charter,
held Saturday night, It WIS agreed
that the work of preparing the
charter should be pushed through
as rapidly as possible and that the
charter should be in readiness in
80 days, If this can be done.


Another meeting of the charter
committee will be held tonight in.
the office of H. M. Stephens. On
Wednesday night meeting will be
held, at which the members who
ran for the position OF charter
commissioners In the recent cleo
ton will be invited to be present.


The charter commission has or
ganized with DR.. Il. D. Olmstead
as chairman, c. M. Fassett rs viceA
chairman and John E. Bla:f as sec
rotary. 1t was agreed that the
work of the commission should be
subdivided among committee on of.
ficial structure, elections, public
improvements. franchises and civil
service.
